description: The teleprompter projector window (CAP-N58). Unlike the chrome-free compositor projectors (which only fetch the preview:// slot), this window needs IPC: it reads the shared teleprompter state (initial `teleprompter_get` snapshot + live `teleprompter` events) so it actually shows the scrolling text, and it closes itself on Esc. Without a capability all of that IPC is denied — the window renders blank and cannot be dismissed.
